title: Rohtak Zoo
tagline: Rohtak Zoo — wildlife reserve of Haryana

overview.short: The Tilyar Mini Zoo, Rohtak is located inside the Tilyar Lake complex on Delhi Road in Rohtak, Haryana, India.
overview.description: The Tilyar Mini Zoo, Rohtak is located inside the Tilyar Lake complex on Delhi Road in Rohtak, Haryana, India. This zoo was built in the year 1987. The Tilyar Zoo at Rohtak is 42 km from Delhi border and the zoo is well maintained. Fishing is permissible at Tilyar Lake after paying ₹200 (US$2.10) fishing fee.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Tilyar Lake
topPlaces.description: Tilyar Lake is one of the major tourist attractions in the Indian state of Haryana. It is 70 km (43 mi) from New Delhi on the Delhi – Fazilka highway and is located close to the city of Rohtak in Haryana.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Rohtak
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Rohtak is a Senior Secondary School (Std 1-12) affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE), New Delhi and functions under the purview of Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS), an autonomous government body. The Vidyalaya imparts school education up to class XII in the streams Science, Commerce and Arts.

topPlaces.name: Asthal Bohar
topPlaces.description: Asthal Bohar, also known as Bohar, is a village on the outskirts of Rohtak city in Rohtak District, Haryana, India. Asthal means Bairagi Monastery.

items.note: Tilyar Lake is one of the major tourist attractions in the Indian state of Haryana. It is 70 km (43 mi) from New Delhi on the Delhi – Fazilka highway and is located close to the city of Rohtak in Haryana.

Kendriya Vidyalaya, Rohtak is a Senior Secondary School (Std 1-12) affiliated to the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE), New Delhi and functions under the purview of Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS), an autonomous government body. The Vidyalaya imparts school education up to class XII in the streams Science, Commerce and Arts.
Asthal Bohar, also known as Bohar, is a village on the outskirts of Rohtak city in Rohtak District, Haryana, India. Asthal means Bairagi Monastery.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rohtak Zoo?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rohtak Zoo is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rohtak Zoo?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (58 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rohtak Zoo?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rohtak Zoo at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rohtak Zoo?
faq.a: Stays in Rohtak Zoo start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rohtak Zoo?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tilyar Lake, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Rohtak, Asthal Bohar.
